periodic_simple.description: Baseline periodic family with one-harmonic amplitude and enough imaginary amplitude to cross the first R = pi orientation-loss sheet.

periodic_harmonic.description: Periodic family with mixed harmonics to test sensitivity inside the admissible periodic class.

lifted_chart_linear.description: Non-periodic chart diagnostic family used only to test how much of the redundancy is intrinsic to the exponential map rather than to periodic admissible functions.
